nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variables template covering CFBD_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL (SQLite or PostgreSQL), and CFBD_MONTHLY_LIMIT for the free-tier API rate limit. Copied to .env during VPS setup.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contribution guidelines covering dev environment setup (Python 3.11+, venv, CFBD API key), running the application, test workflow (unit/integration/E2E), code contribution process, and code review checklist.

nodes.name: DEVELOPMENT.md
nodes.summary: In-depth development guide documenting the full system architecture (FastAPI + SQLAlchemy + SQLite + Nginx + Gunicorn + systemd), module responsibilities, key design patterns, common development tasks, and troubleshooting guide. Technology stack: FastAPI 0.104.1, SQLAlchemy 2.0.23, Pydantic 2.5.0, Uvicorn 0.24.0, Gunicorn 21.2.0.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Test automation Makefile providing targets: test (unit+integration, skips E2E), test-unit, test-integration, test-e2e (requires running server on port 8765), test-fast (parallel with pytest-xdist), test-all, coverage (terminal), coverage-html, clean (removes .pytest_cache/htmlcov/.coverage/__pycache__), and install (pip + playwright chromium).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project README covering the Modified ELO algorithm (preseason ratings from 247Sports recruiting + transfer portal + returning production; in-season updates with home field advantage +65, margin-of-victory multiplier, conference multipliers), FastAPI REST backend, real data integration via collegefootballdata.com, incremental vs reset import modes, API usage monitoring with monthly limit tracking and warning thresholds (80%/90%/95%), and available API endpoints.

nodes.name: REAL_DATA_GUIDE.md
nodes.summary: Guide for importing real 2024 college football data from the CollegeFootballData.com API, covering API key setup, incremental mode (weekly updates, preserves manual corrections) vs reset mode (first-time setup or clean slate), and usage of import_real_data.py and scripts/reset_and_import.sh.
nodes.note: File not present in repository at time of analysis; referenced in README.md

nodes.name: gunicorn_config.py
nodes.summary: Gunicorn production WSGI configuration: binds to 127.0.0.1:8000, 4 workers using UvicornWorker class, 1000 max worker connections, 60s timeout, 5s keepalive, stdout/stderr logging for systemd capture, process named 'cfb-rankings', daemon=False so systemd manages the process lifecycle.

nodes.name: hotfix-api-url.sh
nodes.summary: Hotfix script (2025-10-17) to update frontend/js/api.js with the production API URL to resolve CORS errors caused by hardcoded localhost. Uses scp to upload to /tmp on cfb.bdailey.com then provides manual sudo install steps.

nodes.name: import_playoff_games.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script to import CFP semifinal playoff games (Fiesta Bowl and Peach Bowl, Jan 2026) and generate win predictions. Runs as www-data, loads .env, calls scripts/weekly_update.py for game import, then scripts/generate_all_predictions.py, and verifies results with sqlite3 queries.

nodes.name: production_import.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal production import orchestrator: changes to /var/www/cfb-rankings, sets CFBD_API_KEY, and runs import_real_data.py with auto-confirmed 'yes' pipe. Contains a hardcoded API key (security concern).

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python runtime dependencies: fastapi 0.125.0, starlette 0.50.0, uvicorn[standard] 0.24.0, pydantic 2.5.0, sqlalchemy 2.0.23, python-dotenv 1.0.0, requests>=2.31.0.

nodes.name: requirements-dev.txt
nodes.summary: Development and testing dependencies: pytest 7.4.3, pytest-cov, pytest-asyncio, pytest-mock, httpx 0.28.1 (upgraded for Starlette 0.50.0 compatibility), factory-boy, playwright 1.40.0 (E2E browser automation), pytest-xdist (parallel execution), pytest-timeout, freezegun (datetime mocking), black, flake8, isort. Includes -r requirements.txt.

nodes.name: requirements-prod.txt
nodes.summary: Production-pinned dependencies: fastapi 0.104.1, uvicorn[standard] 0.24.0, gunicorn 21.2.0, pydantic 2.5.0, sqlalchemy 2.0.23, python-dotenv 1.0.0, requests 2.31.0. Note: fastapi version differs from requirements.txt (0.104.1 vs 0.125.0).

nodes.name: pytest.ini
nodes.summary: Pytest configuration: discovers tests in tests/ directory, pythonpath includes . and tests, strict-markers enforced. Defines markers: unit (fast/isolated), integration (API+database), e2e (browser automation), slow (>1s). Async mode set to auto for FastAPI async endpoint testing.
